behavior_in_task_description.reason: All test specifics (.agent/rules/agents.md, AGENTS.md, trigger: always_on, .prettierignore, .pullapprove.yml with .agent/**/{*,.*}, ## Environment, pnpm) are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required outcomes without prescribing symlink vs copy or exact edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept symlink/copy/hardlink for .agent/rules/agents.md (content equality), and use behavioral checks for prettier/pullapprove.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests invoke prettier via npx, pnpm ng-dev pullapprove verify, and parse YAML via yaml.safe_load.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p requires specific behavior (matching content, parseable frontmatter, prettier ignoring file, pullapprove verify passing).

behavior_in_tests.reason: All five instruction requirements (workspace rule, frontmatter, prettier ignore, pullapprove pattern, preserved content) are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped into sections with comment headers (fail_to_pass, pass_to_pass, repo_tests).

structured_data_schema.reason: YAML frontmatter schema documented with example (trigger: always_on).

no_typos.reason: No typos detected in paths or commands.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files to look at but doesn't specify exact line edits.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch makes localized edits to .prettierignore, .pullapprove.yml, and AGENTS.md (adds frontmatter) without full rewrites.
